turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good morning sharon how sharon doing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi sharon is okay today sharon is having some shoulder pain

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor sees that the doctor sees that here in the nurse's notes it looks like sharon is having some right shoulder pain says here that sharon and other people have been remodeling sharon's house what does sharon do sharon remember what sharon was doing when the right shoulder pain started

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah sharon was up on a ladder painting and kinda reaching out and fell took a fall and kinda braced sharon but sharon sharon was painting

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so the right shoulder pain does sound like there might have been some direct trauma to the right shoulder area now the nurse's notes say here that the right shoulder pain started about three weeks ago was sharon able it sounds like sharon was able to get up and continue but sharon was having some pain did sharon take anything at that time to help with the right shoulder pain

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah sharon iced sharon's arm and then sharon also took some advil

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now has sharon had any shoulder pain before of the right shoulder or is the right shoulder pain the first time or or the first insult to the right shoulder area

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: first time

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and now is sharon able to move the right arm for the doctor

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes sharon is able to move but sharon does have some pain lifting overhead raising sharon's arm overhead

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright now does sharon have pain all the time or does the pain come and go

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the pain is some pain is all the time but the pain some is intermittent

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now the doctor you mentioned that sharon had taken some ibuprofen for the pain now let's talk a little bit about sharon's pain rating okay zero being none ten being the worst pain sharon has ever felt in sharon's life can sharon rate sharon's pain for the doctor without any tylenol or advil or any nsaid can sharon rate sharon's pain for the doctor

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: about a six

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now when sharon takes the ibuprofen can sharon rate sharon's pain for the doctor what what's the pain level get to

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the pain goes down to about a four

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so the ibuprofen does help take the edge off of the pain and and sharon is able to kinda move around a little bit then

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so the remodel tell the doctor a little bit about the remodel the doctor's wife and the doctor were working on the doctor's remodel and the doctor and the doctor's wife went they just built the brand-new lowe's here in town has sharon and other people been there yet

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no sharon and other people have not

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: well the doctor did n't know if sharon knows this or not but sharon can save big money there that's the rumor

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so yeah the doctor and other people we've been down there the doctor and other people got some pain the doctor and other people we we got went and got some samples and then hey while the doctor and other people were there the doctor and other people ended up deciding to put down a bunch of flooring too so the doctor really recommend sharon and other people if sharon and other people get a chance go over there and take a look at lowe's sales and and see if sharon and other people ca n't finish sharon's remodeled project

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that sounds great sharon will have to take a look at the flooring as well

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that sounds good so now just out of curiosity is sharon experiencing any numbness or tingling in in sharon's arm or hand

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sharon did when sharon initially hurt the right shoulder but sharon is not no longer having any numbness or tingling

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so a little bit about the doctor's physical exam the doctor is gon na do a quick physical exam on sharon today now sharon's vitals look good but specifically on sharon's right shoulder exam sharon does have limited active and passive range of motion and there is tenderness to the greater tuberosity of the humerus now there is no tenderness at sharon's sternoclavicular joint and sharon does have good strong bilateral hand grips and on sharon's neurovascular exam of sharon's right arm sharon does have brisk capillary refill of less than three seconds and sharon does have equal and bilateral response to sensation and touch which is good now taking a look at sharon's x-ray that the doctor did when sharon came in today good news is that the right shoulder x-ray reveals no fracture or bony abnormality mkay so let the doctor tell sharon a little bit about the doctor's assessment and plan now the doctor sharon's symptoms are most likely due to rotator cuff tendinopathy the doctor thinks that sharon has injured the tendons of the muscles that make up the shoulder so that the doctor thinks that's that's why sharon is having the right shoulder pain the doctor does wan na order an mri of the right shoulder just to make sure that nothing else is going on now the doctor is gon na refer sharon to physical therapy and physical therapy is gon na be about six to eight weeks now the doctor's patients are very successful with physical therapy and let's see how sharon does before the doctor and sharon make the decision that the doctor and sharon would do additional treatment such as a steroid injection to the right shoulder the doctor does want sharon to continue to take an nsaid if sharon can tolerate tylenol the doctor wants sharon to go ahead and take tylenol for the pain does sharon have any questions comments or concerns about the doctor and sharon's treatment plan

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no sharon thinks the treatment plan sounds good sharon ca n't wait to to get some relief

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so the doctor knows the doctor ordered physical therapy for six to eight weeks but the doctor wan na see sharon again in two weeks and the doctor and sharon will evaluate how sharon's doing and make some additional treatment plan at that at that time okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright sounds good the doctor will get the nurse come in and the nurse will take care of sharon and the doctor will see sharon in two weeks

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank you

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: thank you
